title: Verify AGV Stuck Fault on the CellIO Status HMI Screen
summary: Use the operator station HMI to verify the documented AGV Stuck condition by navigating to the Visu_ManControl screen, opening CellIO Status, selecting the affected tipper, and confirming that OUT Fault Status is 82.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an AGV remains at the tipper after tote-tipping is complete and the source procedure calls for HMI verification of the AGV Stuck non-recoverable fault condition.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to perform recovery actions such as forcing OUT W1 values; this runbook covers verification only.
Do not use this runbook to interpret undocumented fault values beyond confirming whether OUT Fault Status equals 82.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the HMI-based verification steps and confirm whether the selected tipper shows OUT Fault Status value 82.

safety_notes: This source-specific runbook is limited to HMI verification and does not include physical intervention.
The source describes this as a non-recoverable fault condition associated with an AGV remaining at the tipper after tote-tipping is complete, likely due to a communication issue.

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
Ability to navigate to the Visu_ManControl screen
system_preconditions: An AGV is suspected to be stuck at a tipper after tote-tipping is complete
The affected tipper can be identified for selection on the HMI

visual_references.description: Reference image of the operator station HMI Visu_ManControl manual control screen, including CellIO Status access.
Page 87 operator station screen artifact associated with the AGV Stuck procedure and HMI verification sequence.
Additional page 87 operator station screen artifact associated with the AGV Stuck procedure and HMI verification sequence.

steps.title: Navigate to the Visu_ManControl screen
steps.purpose: Open the documented HMI screen used for AGV Stuck fault verification.
steps.instruction: Go to the operator station HMI and navigate to the "Visu_ManControl" screen.
steps.expected_result: The Visu_ManControl screen is displayed on the operator station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct manual control screen is open and available for the next action.
steps.failure_condition: The Visu_ManControl screen cannot be located or opened.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the manual control screen reference to identify the Visu_ManControl layout and the area where CellIO Status access is available.
Look for the operator station screen context associated with the AGV Stuck verification procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the operator station HMI is not accessible.
Escalate if the Visu_ManControl screen cannot be identified or opened.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Verify this fault on the operator station HMI: Navigate to the "Visu_ManControl" screen. Press the "CellIO Status" button.
Figure 4-23 appears on page 53 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_2_3_visu_mancontrol_screen.

steps.title: Open CellIO Status
steps.purpose: Access the HMI view used to inspect the tipper fault status values.
steps.expected_result: The CellIO Status view opens from the Visu_ManControl screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The CellIO Status screen or panel is visible and ready for tipper selection.
steps.failure_condition: The CellIO Status button is not visible, does not respond, or the status view does not open.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the CellIO Status access on the Visu_ManControl screen.
Use the page 87 AGV Stuck procedure screen artifact for the CellIO Status verification context.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the CellIO Status button cannot be found.
Escalate if the CellIO Status view does not open after pressing the button.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Verify this fault on the operator station HMI: Navigate to the "Visu_ManControl" screen. Press the "CellIO Status" button.
The nearby text for Figure 4-23 describes CELLIO STATUS access on the manual control screen.

steps.title: Select the affected tipper
steps.purpose: Ensure the fault status being checked corresponds to the tipper where the AGV is stuck.
steps.instruction: Select the tipper where the AGV is stuck.
steps.expected_result: The affected tipper is selected in the CellIO Status view.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected tipper matches the location of the AGV that remains at the tipper.
steps.failure_condition: The correct tipper cannot be identified or selected.

actions.label: Select tipper
actions.exact_action: Select the tipper where the AGV is stuck.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the AGV Stuck procedure screen artifact to identify the tipper selection context.
Look for the HMI area associated with selecting the affected tipper.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the correct tipper cannot be identified or selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Select the tipper where the AGV is stuck. The OUT Fault Status should have a value of 82.

steps.title: Verify OUT Fault Status equals 82
steps.purpose: Confirm whether the selected tipper matches the documented AGV Stuck fault indication.
steps.instruction: Check the "OUT Fault Status" field for the selected tipper and verify that the value is 82.
steps.expected_result: The user confirms whether the selected tipper shows OUT Fault Status value 82.
steps.healthy_condition: OUT Fault Status for the selected tipper is 82, matching the documented AGV Stuck verification condition.
steps.failure_condition: OUT Fault Status is not 82, the field cannot be read, or the displayed value does not match the documented condition.

actions.label: Inspect OUT Fault Status
actions.exact_action: Check the "OUT Fault Status" field for the selected tipper and verify that the value is 82.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the OUT Fault Status field location associated with the selected tipper.
Use the page 87 AGV Stuck screen artifact to identify where the OUT Fault Status value is displayed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the observed OUT Fault Status does not match the documented value of 82.
Escalate if the OUT Fault Status field cannot be read or verified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Select the tipper where the AGV is stuck. The OUT Fault Status should have a value of 82.

success_criteria: The operator station HMI is used to navigate to Visu_ManControl and open CellIO Status.
OUT Fault Status is successfully checked for the selected tipper.
The verification result is determined based on whether the displayed value is 82.
healthy_conditions: The CellIO Status view opens successfully.
The correct tipper can be selected.
OUT Fault Status for the selected tipper displays value 82 when the documented AGV Stuck condition is present.
failure_conditions: The operator station HMI or required screen cannot be accessed.
The CellIO Status button or view cannot be opened.
The correct tipper cannot be identified or selected.
OUT Fault Status does not equal 82.
The displayed fault status cannot be read or verified.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the correct tipper cannot be identified or selected.
Escalate if the observed OUT Fault Status does not match the documented value of 82.
Escalate if the HMI does not provide access to the required Visu_ManControl or CellIO Status views.
Do not apply undocumented fault interpretation within this runbook.
